items.text: 现在，让我们通过 Control Rig 来了解关键帧动画，在 Sequencer 中进行简单的动画调整。 Now let's take a look at keyframe animation with Control Rig to make simple animation tweaks all inside of Sequencer. 现在，我只想把这一点作为一个善意的提醒，因为我正在为所有不同经验水平的人制作这门课程 Now I just want to have this as a friendly reminder because I'm making this course for all different experience levels 我认为，一旦你进入角色的兔子洞，有些东西就会变得非常明显 and I think something that becomes very obvious once you fall down the rabbit hole of getting into characters 因为它们很难建造。 is that they are quite difficult to build. 这有很多原因。 Now there's plenty of reasons for that. 主要原因是，你需要在各个层面都达到艺术巅峰的人。 The main reason is that you need people at the peak of their art form on every level. 因此，需要建模、贴图和装配。 So the modeling, the texturing, and the rigging. 这不包括新郎，也不包括动画。 That doesn't include groom and that doesn't include animation. 并创造出令人惊叹的逼真角色、 And to create an amazing looking photorealistic character, 你需要一个精通所有这些学科的人。 you need someone who is very good at every single one of those disciplines. 因此，如果你是第一次学习和入门、 So if you're learning and getting started for the first time, 在学习过程中，请尽量从任何地方下载现有角色 make sure to try to download existing characters from wherever you can while you're learning 这样您就可以真正理解它们在虚幻中应该如何工作。 so that you can really understand how they're supposed to work inside of Unreal. 这样，在与其他艺术家交流或学习其他技能和学科时，就会容易得多、 And that'll make it a lot easier to communicate to other artists or as you learn these other skills and disciplines, 您就会明白需要如何创建才能正确输入到虚幻中。 you'll understand how that needs to be created to feed correctly into Unreal. 因此，找到这些现有角色的最佳资源就是 Mixamo。 So the best resources for finding those existing characters are Mixamo. 紧接着，我将向你展示如何下载角色和动画包，并将它们串联起来。 Right after this, I'll show you how to download a character and animation packs and string those together. 这是一个很好的动画资源。 And this is a great resource for animations. Epic Games Marketplace 有很多优秀的免费角色和付费角色、 The Epic Games Marketplace has a lot of great free characters and paid characters, 这取决于你在寻找什么。 depending on what you're looking for. 他们发布了大量 Paragon 游戏中的角色、 They've released a ton of characters from their Paragon game, 它为你提供了许多造型各异的角色，这些角色都做得非常出色。 which gives you a lot of different looking characters that are all really well done. 他们在使用物理资产方面有很多很好的例子。 And there's a lot of great examples on how they've been using physics assets. 如果你想继续学习，也可以直接从现有的资产库中购买。 If you want to keep going down that learning path or just buy them from existing asset libraries. 但钻井平台可能有点难以预测。 But the rigs can be a little unpredictable. 所以，这只是一些提醒。 So that's just some caution. 我想让你们知道，出于两个非常重要的原因，我们肯定不会在本课程中涉及超人类。 I wanted you to know that for certain we are not going to cover metahumans in this course for some two very important reasons. 首先，它们对初学者根本不友好。 The first is they are not beginner friendly at all. 它们非常非常复杂。 They are very, very complicated. 他们正在使用每一个功能集。 They're using every single feature set. 头部和颈部与身体分离。 The head and neck are separate from the body. 默认情况下，它们都有布和头发模拟。 They have cloth and hair simulations on by default. 他们使出浑身解数，打造出这些令人印象深刻的资产。 And they're just throwing everything at it to make these really impressive assets. 但作为第一次学习虚幻 But as your first learning Unreal, 我认为了解角色和动画制作流程更为重要、 I think it's way more important to understand not just the character and animation workflow, 而是所有这些不同的组成部分如何共同发挥作用、 but how all of these different components are working together, 因为对于第一次学习虚幻技术的人来说，它们都是全新的。 since they're all brand new to someone learning Unreal for the first time.
items.speaker: instructor
